'''Zorb''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Zorb system/Legends|Zorb system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Atlas" />

{{Noncanonstart|legends=1}}

A blue-tongued self-described "Rubenesque beauty" once placed a personal ad seeking a generous [[Gender/Legends|male]] from either Zorb or the planet [[Cryon]].<ref name="Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas">''[[Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas]]''</ref>

{{Noncanonend}}
